content.speakerText: Do you use Reels? I'm obsessed with the new filters.
content.speakerTextCn: 你用Reels吗？我超爱那些新滤镜。
expectedAnswers: Totally! The dancing ones are my favorite—so addictive!
I use them for my small business; they help me get noticed.
Not really—I find them distracting and stick to regular posts.
evaluationCriteria: 是否回应了Reels的使用意图（娱乐/工作/拒绝）
是否使用了场景关键词如obsessed, filters, dancing, static pics
表达是否自然流畅，符合口语习惯

content.speakerText: Why do you use Threads? Isn't it just Twitter 2.0?
expectedAnswers: It's less crowded and more respectful—perfect for real talks.
I don't get why people use it; X does everything better.
Threads is great for long-form posts and deeper connections.
evaluationCriteria: 是否清晰对比了Threads与其他平台（如X/Twitter）
是否使用了less/more/just等对比关键词
语言是否自然，是否避免机械重复原句

content.speakerText: Which social media feature do you think is the most useful, and why?
content.speakerTextCn: 你认为哪个社交媒体功能最有用？为什么？
expectedAnswers: I think Stories are the most useful because they feel personal and disappear after 24 hours.
DMs—they let me chat privately with friends without posting publicly.
Reels for discovery; I’ve found so many small businesses through trending videos.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确指出一个具体功能（如Stories, DMs, Reels）
是否给出合理且具体的理由（使用场景、情感、实用性）
是否使用了场景相关词汇（discovery, private, trending, authentic）
